'''''Karei''''' was a [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] that served with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was attacked by [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] ''[[Ull]]'', which had [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]] from [[Avenger Squadron]] as well as [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] as backup. The Dreadnaught had [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] and [[A-wing]]s to cover its attempted retreat as well as [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wings]] as backup.

==Behind the scenes==
The outcome depends on the player's decision.

*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
